name: HEMANGIOMA OF GASTROINTESTINAL TRACT
definition: unusual single / multiple vascular tumors anywhere in GI tract

demographics.Frequency: 7-10% of all benign small bowel tumors
demographics.Age: any; commonly during infancy / early childhood
demographics.Location: jejunum (55%), ileum (42%), duodenum (2%); rare in stomach + colon (mostly

dominant_finding: well-circumscribed avidly enhancing often intraluminal lobulated mass of mixed
